title: Soak Test - No Headset connected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: App remains responsive and does not crash after prolonged idle on Home Screen with no headset connected
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
2. On the Home screen, ensure no headset is connected.
3. Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground for multiple hours (e.g., overnight).
4. After several hours, check that the app is still running and responsive.
expected: The app remains running and responsive after prolonged idle use. No memory leaks, crashes, or unresponsiveness occur.
